title: Depower and reinitialise battery electric vehicles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Depower and reinitialise battery electric vehicles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to depower and reinitialise BEV

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for servicing activity 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for servicing activity 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Identify required information for servicing activity 1.3 Identify hazards associated with the work, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies and procedures1.4 Identify tools and equipment required for servicing activity and establish serviceability according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to depower and reinitialise BEV

elements.title: Deactivate vehicle RESS

pcs.text: Locate and disconnect SELV supply according to manufacturer specifications2.2 Locate and remove RESS service plug or manual service disconnect to depower vehicle HV RESS according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Stabilise vehicle is stabilised ensure zero residual voltage according to manufacturer procedures2.4 Secure and retain RESS service plug or manual service disconnect to prevent refitting by third party
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Locate and disconnect SELV supply according to manufacturer specifications2.2 Locate and remove RESS service plug or manual service disconnect to depower vehicle HV RESS according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Stabilise vehicle is stabilised ensure zero residual voltage according to manufacturer procedures2.4 Secure and retain RESS service plug or manual service disconnect to prevent refitting by third party?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Locate and disconnect SELV supply according to manufacturer specifications2.2 Locate and remove RESS service plug or manual service disconnect to depower vehicle HV RESS according to manufacturer specifications2.3 Stabilise vehicle is stabilised ensure zero residual voltage according to manufacturer procedures2.4 Secure and retain RESS service plug or manual service disconnect to prevent refitting by third party.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Deactivate vehicle RESS

elements.title: Reinitialise vehicle RESS

pcs.text: Reconnect SELV and RESS service plug or manual service disconnect in the correct order and reactivate vehicle 3.2 Carry out diagnostic tests to ensure correct recalibration of subsystems affected by depower process according to manufacturer procedures3.3 Check RESS and vehicle subsystems for correct operation3.4 Report post-reactivation faults according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Reconnect SELV and RESS service plug or manual service disconnect in the correct order and reactivate vehicle 3.2 Carry out diagnostic tests to ensure correct recalibration of subsystems affected by depower process according to manufacturer procedures3.3 Check RESS and vehicle subsystems for correct operation3.4 Report post-reactivation faults according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Reconnect SELV and RESS service plug or manual service disconnect in the correct order and reactivate vehicle 3.2 Carry out diagnostic tests to ensure correct recalibration of subsystems affected by depower process according to manufacturer procedures3.3 Check RESS and vehicle subsystems for correct operation3.4 Report post-reactivation faults according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Reinitialise vehicle RESS

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 4.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
